get.description:
**Summary:**  
Both collected tests in `test_employees_id_get.py` failed during setup due to a `FileNotFoundError`. The file `/var/tmp/.../api.json` required by the SwaggerSchemaValidator fixture could not be found, resulting in errors for `test_employees_id_success` and `test_employees_id_not_found`. No tests were executed.

post.description: All three tests in **test_employees_post.py** failed due to a **FileNotFoundError**. The error occurred during setup when the fixture attempted to load the Swagger schema from `'api.json'`, which was not found at the specified path. No tests were executed; only setup errors occurred.

get.description:
Summary:

Out of 3 collected tests, 2 failed and 1 was skipped.  
The failures occurred in test_employees_get.py due to a ValueError raised when merging test data, specifically: "dictionary update sequence element #0 has length 4; 2 is required" in conftest.py.  
No tests passed.
